Container.Name: catcher-show
Container.Overview:
[b]CATCHER // Show v3.4[/b]
Live threat visualization for OPNsense Suricata events with persistent history.
[b]NEW in v3.4:[/b] [list] [*]Persistent JSONL event store (survives container restart) [*]Time-window slider: 30m / 60m / 3h / 6h / 12h / 18h / 24h [*]Daily file rotation with configurable retention (default 7 days) [*]Restored history on container startup [/list]
[b]Features:[/b] [list] [*]Animated attack arcs (Source → Home) [*]Inbound/Outbound direction detection [*]Suricata Alert + Anomaly + suspicious HTTP + suspect TLS [*]TLS JA3/JA4 threat-intel via abuse.ch SSLBL (auto-updated) [*]GeoIP enrichment with country centroid fallback [*]Filter buttons by direction and event type [*]Adaptive design: TV / Desktop / Tablet / Phone [/list]
[b]Access:[/b] http://[UNRAID-IP]:8090

Config.Name: Syslog Port (UDP)
Config.Description: UDP port for Suricata EVE-JSON from OPNsense

Config.Name: Home Latitude
Config.Description: Your home location latitude (map center and arc target) - SET THIS

Config.Name: Home Longitude
Config.Description: Your home location longitude - SET THIS

Config.Name: Events Storage
Config.Description: Persistent JSONL event store. One file per day, auto-pruned by retention policy. NEW in v3.4.

Config.Name: Threat Intel Cache
Config.Description: Persistent storage for downloaded abuse.ch JA3 fingerprint CSV

Config.Name: Persist Enabled
Config.Description: Enable persistent JSONL event store. Set to false for in-memory-only operation.

Config.Name: Retention Days
Config.Description: How many days of event files to keep. Older files are auto-pruned hourly.

Config.Name: History Hours
Config.Description: Max time-window the slider can request (in hours)

Config.Name: Default Window Minutes
Config.Description: Default slider position when a client connects

Config.Name: Max Events in Memory
Config.Description: Soft cap on RAM-held events. Older events fall out but stay on disk.

Config.Name: Threat Intel Auto-Update
Config.Description: Download abuse.ch JA3 fingerprints automatically (requires container internet)

Config.Name: Threat Intel Update Hours
Config.Description: How often to download from abuse.ch (in hours)
